name: The Office Golf CT
about: The Office Golf CT is a golf simulator venue that combines the game with a social, bar-like atmosphere. It appears to offer a relaxed environment for playing golf, likely focused on providing a space for casual play and social gatherings. The venue is set up to accommodate groups, with various payment options and a checkout system indicating they operate on a per-session basis. It is suited for those looking for a hybrid experience of golfing and socializing, possibly after work or for events with friends.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium simulator technology for accurate play and practice
Relaxed sports bar atmosphere perfect for socializing
Ideal venue for corporate events and group bookings
Multiple payment options including digital wallets and major credit cards
Convenient location for both after-work play and weekend outings

food_and_drink.notes: Food service available, though specific menu details are not provided on the website.
Full bar service available, as indicated by the 'sim_bar' venue type and the presence of a dedicated payment section.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether clubs are provided, so it is recommended to bring your own or contact the venue directly for clarification.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: The venue has a full bar and serves food, but it does not specify if outside food or drink is permitted. Please contact them directly to confirm their policy on outside items.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific time estimates for playing 18 holes. The duration can vary based on the simulator software and number of players in your group, so it's best to ask the staff when booking.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: There is no specific information on the website regarding child-friendly policies or activities. It is advisable to contact The Office Golf CT directly to inquire if they accommodate families with children.
